constraints.name: Event loop 非阻塞
constraints.description: esp_event_loop 回调中禁止阻塞调用

constraints.name: NVS commit 延迟
constraints.description: nvs_set 后必须 nvs_commit，但 commit 有延迟

constraints.name: WDT feed 策略
constraints.description: Task WDT 必须定期 feed，长阻塞会触发复位

constraints.name: OTA rollback
constraints.description: OTA 后必须 mark_valid，否则回滚

constraints.name: WiFi reconnect backoff
constraints.description: WiFi 断连后必须指数退避重连

constraints.name: PSRAM DMA 限制
constraints.description: SPI DMA 不支持 PSRAM，I2S DMA 必须在 Internal SRAM

constraints.name: Core affinity WiFi
constraints.description: WiFi/LwIP 任务绑定 Core 0，用户任务建议 Core 1
